phrases.intent_en: Ask where Plaza de los Naranjos is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la Plaza de los Naranjos?
phrases.pronunciation: dee-SKOOL-peh DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH PLAH-thah DEH LOHS nah-RAHN-hohs

likely_response.local: Siga recto y gire a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh Y HEE-reh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah

responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh Y HEE-reh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Siga recto y gire a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a tapas bar nearby
phrases.text_local: ¿Hay un bar de tapas por aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: AHY OON BAHR DEH TAH-pahs POHR ah-k-Í

phrases.intent_en: Ask where a souvenir shop is
phrases.pronunciation: DÓN-deh AHY OO-nah tee-EHN-dah DEH reh-koo-EHR-dohs

likely_response.local: En la siguiente calle, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH see-g-ee-EHN-teh KAHL-leh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: On the next street, to the right.

responses.english: On the next street, to the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH see-g-ee-EHN-teh KAHL-leh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la siguiente calle, a la derecha.

likely_response.translation_en: There is an underground parking lot there.

responses.english: There is an underground parking lot there.
